programme.desc: 16/21. Phoenix has picked up a strange smell. Tha Phoenix air fàile neònach fhaighinn. Tha na buthaidean a' feuchainn ri thuigsinn cò às a thàinig e.

programme.title: Boban is Fuigheag
programme.desc: 1/40. Feumar Fuigheag a shocrachadh an-diugh nuair a tha rud steigeach a' steigeadh ris. Fuigheag must be calmed when a sticky thing gets attached to him.

programme.desc: 11/15. Eilidh Cormack meets Callum and his pet dogs Penny and Poppy.

programme.desc: 5/52. Tha 'ad uile a' sàbhaladh bhoiteagan an-diugh. They're all saving worms today.

programme.title: An Teaghlach Rìoghail an...

programme.title: Eòrpa/European Current Affairs

programme.title: Trusadh - Beatha air an Oir/Lost Villages
programme.desc: 12/14. Bailtean a chaidh fhalamhachadh ann an Ùig, na Hearadh agus na Lochan. Deserted villages in Uig, Harris and Lochs.

programme.title: Hebridean Baker - Nordic Islands
programme.desc: 1/4. Coinneach MacLeod explores the food traditions of the Faroes. Tha Coinneach MacLeòid a' faighinn blasad de chultar a' bhidhe sna h-Eileanan Fàrach.

programme.title: Belladrum 2025 - Ben Walker
programme.desc: 9/33. An seinneadair-sgrìobhadair Albannach, Ben Walker le seisean acoustic aig Belladrum 2025. Scottish singer-songwriter Ben Walker performs an acoustic session.

programme.title: Dàna | Scotland's Wild Side

programme.desc: 31/52. Tha iad a' campadh a-muigh a-nochd ach chan eil e cho furasta dhaibh tuiteam nan cadal. They're camping outside tonight but it isn't so easy for them to fall asleep.

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: 5/52. Tha 'ad uile a' sàbhaladh bhoiteagan an-diugh. They're all saving worms today.

programme.title: Pip & Posy

programme.title: Cleasan Ataidh & Tilidh/The...

programme.title: Daolag-bhreac is Seillean/Ladybird & Bee
programme.desc: 12/26. Tha Seillean a' sealltainn dhuinn mar a tha i a dèanamh mil. Seillean shows us how she makes honey.

programme.title: Stòiridh

programme.title: An Saoghal Droil aig Pol...

programme.title: Hilda

programme.title: Coig Criomagan CBBC ALBA
programme.desc: 2/2. Ellen NicDhòmhnaill le taghadh de na còig criomagan fiosrachaidh a b' fheàrr a chòrd rithe fhèin. Ellen MacDonald introduces a selection of her favourite facts.

programme.title: An Sgoil
programme.desc: 2/6. Tha bhìoras coimpiutaireach mu sgaoil ann an Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche. A computer virus is spreading through Sgoil Taobh na Cloiche.

programme.desc: 11/15. Eilidh Cormack meets Callum and his pet dogs Penny and Poppy.

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: 73/82. Derek MacIntosh reads Am Mathan a Bhiodh a' Coimhead, written and illustrated by Duncan Beadie and translated into Gaelic by Morag Stewart.

programme.title: Flix

programme.title: OMC!
programme.desc: 2/4. Sketch show featuring an intimate dining experience, an embarrassing confrontation in the shopping aisle, and old friends at war.

programme.title: Transatlantic Sessions: Dluth an Daimh
programme.desc: 2/6. Featuring performances from Mary Chapin Carpenter, Aly Bain, Mairéad Ní Mhaonaigh, Fiona Kennedy and Dan Tyminski.

programme.title: Ibsen: The Wild Duck
programme.desc: The 1971 adaption of the classic play by Henrik Ibsen. A family's fragile peace is shattered by an idealist who insists on exposing hidden truths.

programme.title: The Australian Wars
programme.desc: 2/3. How the growing number of European arrivals in Tasmania saw the death count grow, too. Contains some violence and some upsetting scenes.

programme.title: The Secret World of Haute Couture
programme.desc: Margy Kinmonth meets millionaire customers and world-famous designers as she explores the anachronistic but little-explained pocket of the fashion industry known as haute couture.

programme.title: Eurovision Classical Concerts: Lisbon
programme.desc: Celebrating great music-making across Europe, a special concert from the Gulbenkian Foundation in Lisbon, also featuring the works of Smetana and Debussy. Nicholas Collon presents.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Having transformed an ordinary BMW into a racing car in just ten days, the chaps enter Silverstone's Britcar 24-hour race - Jeremy describes it as the scariest thing he's ever done.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Opportunity of a Lifetime: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game. Erica makes an important decision about her future.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Spaceballs: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after watching the movie Spaceballs. Erica plans to tell Beverly and Pops about a big decision she's made.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Red Alert: Lily has reached a womanly milestone that Cam and Mitch are not prepared for at all. So they call in reinforcements...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Wild: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle. And Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan a baby shower.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween IV: It's Halloween, so the squad follow precinct tradition and compete for the title of Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Monster in the Closet: When Pimento and Diaz decide to tie the knot, the squad try to prepare the perfect wedding under Santiago's careful direction.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Insane Clown Poppy: Homer and Bart take Lisa to a book fair, where Krusty meets his long-lost daughter (guest star Drew Barrymore). But it doesn't go well...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa the Tree Hugger: A dramatic rooftop protest at Krusty Burger inspires Lisa to become an eco-radical - especially when she sees how cute one of the protestors is...

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: On the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex struggles with his truth. Gemma faces a painful revelation, and Sienna makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4: Professor Frink uses science to turn into a ladies' man. And medication makes Grampa and the Retirement Castle residents hallucinate.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Louis Theroux, Jenny Eclair, Russell Howard and Ovie Soko tackle a giant biscuit, a classic bake and a choux sculpture depicting their perfect day.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time on the Box: Heartstopper, Made in Chelsea, The Circle, Bee Czar, Ramsay's Future Food Stars, and BBC News covering Keir Starmer's lockdown 'Beergate' controversy.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dog groomer Nico is after the perfect partner to get her all hot under the collar, while care worker Patrice wants a divine angel who can also be a horny devil in the bedroom.

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Return of the Exes: Two old faces are hellbent on reclaiming their connections. And one gets a chance to do so on a date with his old flame - and her new beau.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers tune in to Eurovision, Beat the Chasers, The Queen's Platinum Jubilee Celebration, The Repair Shop, and horror film Drag Me to Hell.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time on the Box: Heartstopper, Made in Chelsea, The Circle, Bee Czar, Ramsay's Future Food Stars, and BBC News covering Keir Starmer's lockdown 'Beergate' controversy.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dog groomer Nico is after the perfect partner to get her all hot under the collar, while care worker Patrice wants a divine angel who can also be a horny devil in the bedroom.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer vs Dignity: Homer asks Mr Burns for a pay rise after the family have to dress up as a mariachi band and sing for their dinner. But Mr Burns has a better idea...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Edward 'Eddie the Eagle' Edwards: Barry seeks fresh inspiration when he loses his standing as a champion athlete at school. Sales at Murray's shop nosedive.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dirty Dancing Dance: Erica suggests the film Dirty Dancing as the theme for the upcoming school dance, but Principal Ball refuses to sanction her idea.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Fifteen Percent: Mitchell seeks revenge when Jay introduces Cameron as just his 'friend'. Gloria gives Manny's date a makeover.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Wannabe King: Harry wants to be king for the day. But bride Charlotte wants something low key. Will this be Harry's crowning moment or will it be 'off with his head'?

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: Rude Tube's naughty little sister presents more clips, this time with a twist of karma. Featuring a fall into a river, a penalty kick back and an attempt to get dressed on a treadmill.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Gemma's determined to uncover the truth behind her dad's behaviour. Rex is forced to hide as he continues to explore his identity. And a newly released resident returns to seek revenge...

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: On the day of the joint engagement party, secrets threaten to spill, while Rex struggles with his truth. Gemma faces a painful revelation, and Sienna makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sheep.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Lela's: In California, Gordon Ramsay visits Lela's, a fine dining restaurant run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. Can Gordon save them from complete disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Sebastian's: Gordon Ramsay visits Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Los Angeles. The customers are scarce and the debt is mounting. Can Gordon turn the restaurant's fortunes around?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Dinner with the Goldbergs: Geoff takes Erica out to a restaurant with her family to celebrate her birthday, but dinner with the Goldbergs is no ordinary meal...

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Hooters: Adam and Murray fall out over Adam's plans to pursue a comedy career after his act in woodwork class nearly results in his teacher getting injured.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Did the Chicken Cross the Road?: When Alex is up for a prestigious government job that requires a family interview, everyone tries too hard, which jeopardises her chances.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Putting Down Roots: Dede's husband Jerry comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they know what to do with.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Finn McCool's: Gordon Ramsay visits Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, where the family feuding has got out of hand. Can Gordon mediate?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Olde Stone Mill: Gordon Ramsay visits The Olde Stone Mill in Tuckahoe, New York. The restaurant has been restored, but owner Dean can't get customers through the door.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Paranoia: Jeffords disapproves of Diaz's fast-moving relationship with Pimento, who thinks that someone from his past is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Maximum Security: Santiago goes undercover at a women's prison and befriends one of the inmates. Holt and the team plan a fake funeral to catch a hitman.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Canine Mutiny: Bart buys Laddie, an amazing new dog, with a credit card that's accidentally been sent to Santa's Little Helper.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Old Man and the Lisa: Mr Burns loses all his money and employs Lisa to help him earn back his fortune. But they don't see eye to eye over ethical issues.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Let's Val Kilmer This Car: When Lainey turns down Barry's invitation to take her to the prom, he plans a prank with Principal Ball's car to get out of going.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Sixteen Candles: Murray and Beverly forget Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Stand by Your Man: Dylan and Luke are impressed by Bill's tales of heroism as a firefighter, which makes Phil feel emasculated. So he invites the guys over for male bonding.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Yes-Woman: To be less negative, Claire rebrands herself as the woman who says 'yes', and inadvertently approves of Luke's new relationship with a colleague.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Mr Santiago: Peralta goes to extremes to impress Santiago's dad at Thanksgiving dinner. Holt helps Pimento deal with life after the NYPD.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Skyfire Cycle: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong literary hero.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer vs Dignity: Homer asks Mr Burns for a pay rise after the family have to dress up as a mariachi band and sing for their dinner. But Mr Burns has a better idea...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Computer Wore Menace Shoes: After Homer publishes damaging rumours on 'Mr X's Web Page', he ends up on a Prisoner-style island, complete with guest star Patrick McGoohan.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes returns from rehab with a shocking proposal. Sienna and Myra fight to keep baby Joseph in the village. Ste eagerly plans a holiday with Rex.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Gal of Constant Sorrow: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer. Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
programme.desc: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Richard Dreyfuss, Patsy Palmer, James Buckley and Scarlett Moffatt tackle roulades and a tricky Technical, and make their favourite place in cake.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time: Hunted, Bake Off: The Professionals, Made in Chelsea, Love in the Jungle, Top of the Pops '92, and BBC News on Partygate photos incriminating Boris Johnson.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching: Starstruck, The Home Edit, Made in Chelsea, SAS, This Is Going to Hurt, Dynasties II, and Pam & Tommy.

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: (2005) Gael Garcia Bernal plays an ex-navy rating who infiltrates pastor William Hurt's family to exact revenge for a wrong suffered by his mother. Sex/violence/strong language from start.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal with...
programme.desc: ...Abigail Gorman: Abigail is a well-known activist and campaigner. We follow her through an ADHD diagnosis and ask her what the future might hold.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Fixed Bayonets!
programme.desc: (1951) Korean War drama about the stress of battle. Officers drop one by one as a US platoon fights a rearguard action, leaving one unwilling man (Richard Basehart) to take their place.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: (1968) Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

programme.title: The Rare Breed
programme.desc: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: (2023) Eva Longoria directs the real-life story of Richard Montañez - the Latino janitor who invented Flamin' Hot Cheetos, aka the 'world's most popular snack'. Starring Jesse Garcia.

programme.title: Call Jane
programme.desc: (2022) Fact-based drama with Elizabeth Banks and Sigourney Weaver. An underground abortion network helps a woman with a life-threatening pregnancy in pre-Roe-v-Wade America.

programme.title: I'm Your Man
programme.desc: (2021) Poignant sci-fi romantic comedy with Maren Eggert and Dan Stevens. In near-future Berlin, a lonely archaeologist helps to trial a new line in robot companions. In German/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

programme.title: Men in Black: International...
programme.desc: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

programme.title: Blackberry
programme.desc: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: (2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.

programme.title: Journeyman
programme.desc: (2018) Paddy Considine and Jodie Whittaker star in Considine's sobering drama about a boxer who wins his world championship bout, only to be left with a serious head injury. Violence.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: The Mark of Zorro
programme.desc: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

programme.title: The Major and the Minor
programme.desc: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

programme.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
programme.desc: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: (2015) Drama exploring the increasingly defiant campaign by British women for equality and the right to vote in the years before WWI. Starring Carey Mulligan and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

programme.title: Boss Level
programme.desc: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.desc: (2013) All-American action thriller starring Channing Tatum and Jamie Foxx. A Capitol police officer steps up to protect the President when the White House is compromised.

programme.title: The King
programme.desc: (2005) Gael Garcia Bernal plays an ex-navy rating who infiltrates pastor William Hurt's family to exact revenge for a wrong suffered by his mother. Sex/violence/strong language from start.
